name: career-hunter-agent
description: Agente seguro de busca, análise, preparação e acompanhamento de vagas para Giasi Mandela Silva.

scripts.scan: npm run build && node dist/src/index.js scan
scripts.scan-all: npm run build && node dist/src/index.js scan-all
scripts.score: npm run build && node dist/src/index.js score
scripts.prepare: npm run build && node dist/src/index.js prepare
scripts.prepare-all: npm run build && node dist/src/index.js prepare-all
scripts.daily-summary: npm run build && node dist/src/index.js daily-summary
scripts.weekly-radar: npm run build && node dist/src/index.js weekly-radar
